_authority: MANUAL_REFERENCE — full plant ledger. Runtime-hot subset lives in ACTIVE_PLANTS.md. Masters (CREW_MASTER, ANTAGONISTS, RIVALS_FUTURE) win on plant detail; this file distills.

_status_key.HOT: Fires this arc or next session. Watch for opening.
_status_key.WARM: Primed. Fires when scene conditions meet trigger.
_status_key.DEEP-LOCK: Author truth. Do NOT surface in player-facing text, HUD, dashboards, NPC dialogue, bounty posters, Marine files until explicit reveal beat fires.
_status_key.ARMED: External trigger already in flight (news cycle, Marine filing). Fires when the external clock lands, not on scene action.

plants.title: Melaina's mother held by Shanks
plants.fire_when: crew is strong enough to survive Yonko territory; never early
plants.payoff: saga-level bomb. The direction of her mother's captivity resolves toward Shanks.
plants.notes: Mourning bands are NOT for her mother — they are for other losses. Crew may assume wrong. Do NOT correct in-world until reveal.

plants.title: Sable recognized Yann's Donquixote signet ring
plants.fire_when: pressure moment in Tessara — Merdo about to trust Yann, or about to accept a deal, or about to miss the threat
plants.payoff: Sable tells Merdo what she saw. Forces crew recalibration mid-Tessara. Also burns some of her CP-0 cover — she had to read the ring.
plants.notes: She has not told him. The not-telling is the tension. Do not resolve before Tessara mid-arc.

plants.title: Kara's Goroa pendant / Korvaal's spiral echo
plants.fire_when: Kara encounters someone who reads the spiral, or when Mira Odinu thread activates (Ridas letter arrives with unusual content)
plants.payoff: world acknowledgment of Merdo's public name-protection at Goroa. Connects Kara's identity-in-formation to a symbol she carries but hasn't fully claimed.
plants.notes: Pendant is Adaam Goroa's gift, mirroring Korvaal's spiral. Ambient recurring visual, not a single-fire plant.

plants.title: Hoyt Boys dock incident — Merdo's acknowledgment
plants.fire_when: early in Tessara — during or near Merdo's acceptance of Nox onto crew
plants.payoff: Merdo remembers OR does not. If he does, Nox's debt reconfigures into chosen service. If he does not, Nox lives with having given himself to someone who forgot him — a knife that reshapes his arc.
plants.notes: This is the player's call, not the DM's. Do not puppet Merdo. Prompt via NPC action (a Hoyt witness surfaces at dockside, or the dock scar is visible).

plants.title: Sumi echoes Hudore's runaway daughter Vireen
plants.fire_when: first scene Hudore sees Sumi — crowd shot, dockside, tournament bracket line
plants.payoff: FIRST PARTIAL FIRE: Hudore's Observation slips for one beat — a stutter not in three years. Sumi will not know why he looked. Scene scored for Vireen; Sumi never learns within this fire.
plants.notes: Vireen was 17 when she left; Sumi is 16. Hudore hasn't said her name aloud in 38 months. Scene plays in his head; player reads the slip. Full fire pairs with rack-016.

plants.title: The Whale — prisoner in the Cage, identity OPEN
plants.fire_when: rescue arc triggers — crew enters the Cage (Merdo thrown in after Cup loss, OR crew rescue operation)
plants.payoff: the Whale's identity surfaces. Candidate: Yonko officer in hiding. Reveal triggers possible alliance or hostile-neutral dynamic.
plants.notes: Identity is genuinely OPEN — the DM decides via play what serves the arc. Do not pre-lock.

plants.title: Parseval's connection to Brother Allun
plants.fire_when: Merdo faces Parseval in the Cup bracket, OR Merdo encounters Allun in the Cage, OR a Parseval chant references Allun
plants.payoff: unlocks Parseval as 3D character (not just tournament fighter). Possible rescue motive for Allun. Parseval may switch sides or grant quarter on Allun's fate.
plants.notes: Parseval chants his named attacks — the chant may be a prayer for Allun. Plant fires best in the Cup round, not earlier.

plants.title: Petra Mauler says Vireen's name aloud in Merdo's presence
plants.fire_when: Petra / Hudore chess scene, OR the moment after Hudore loses two games and asks her to — if Merdo is close enough to hear
plants.payoff: full fire of Hudore's wound. Merdo learns Vireen exists without Hudore telling him directly. Player choice: use the intel, or respect it. This choice defines the Hudore relationship arc.
plants.notes: Petra is the ONLY person who will say the name aloud. She does so ONLY when Hudore has lost two games and asks. Scene is earnable, not engineered.

plants.title: The Mango Conspiracy
plants.fire_when: ambient — never plot-relevant, always texture. Sumi's theories are the scene-level fire.
plants.payoff: comedy. Crew solidarity. The unspoken thing they both deny that everyone knows.
plants.notes: This is not a structural plant — it is load-bearing running-gag texture. Do not resolve.

plants.title: Nox = Norbert Hoyt (real name hidden)
plants.fire_when: one-time comedy/grief bomb. Either (a) Marine paperwork surfaces at a bounty poster, or (b) Nox chooses to say it himself at the RIGHT moment.
plants.payoff: scene-defining. Nox either reveals to earn his place, or the world reveals it to strip him of the armor. Both break open who he is under the hat.
plants.notes: Cooldown: 1× per 2–3 sessions for guessing-gag. Do NOT burn the reveal. The reveal is a single scene, not a drip.

plants.title: Merdo's 'D.' — Archon D. Merdo (PUBLIC)
plants.fire_when: Already public. Merdo's full name is Archon D. Merdo — appears in Marine files, bounty posters, News Coo headlines. Canon-parallel to Luffy/Garp/Dragon/Roger/Law. What the Will of D. MEANS (saga-level Void Century mystery) stays canon-unknown; the letter in the name is not hidden.
plants.payoff: The name itself carries no hidden reveal anymore. The meaning of the D. (and what the world government actively suppresses about it) is the saga-level thread — fires only if play pushes into it.
plants.notes: Updated per user directive 2026-04-23: D. is PUBLIC in canon parallel. Nothing to reveal about the letter — it's in the name. The WILL of D. as systemic mystery is separate from the NAME.

plants.title: Ashren's wings publicly revealed at Ashenmaw
plants.fire_when: next News Coo cycle. External clock, not scene-triggered.
plants.payoff: Marine report files. Bounty possible. Kill-order possible. Other Lunarian survivors (if any) may seek him. Yann files for Family acquisition pay without delivery attempt.
plants.notes: ARMED means the trigger is already in flight. Fires whether Merdo acts or not. Do not treat as Merdo-decision plant.

plants.title: Aslan is Merdo's younger brother (arrives at Sabaody, Worst Generation window)
plants.saga_lock: Sabaody convergence window — no pre-scheduled cameo/conversation beats
plants.fire_when: EMERGENT. Aslan exists as character canon and arrives at Sabaody Archipelago in the canon Worst Generation convergence window (~Ch 497+). Could cross paths with Merdo before Sabaody at sea, at an island, or not until Sabaody itself — DM shapes in the moment. Recognition is NOT automatic (brothers haven't seen each other in 11 years). First-contact scene is EARNED by play, not pre-scheduled.
plants.payoff: Defines a major emotional beat of the saga — whenever it fires. Merdo sold himself at 15 to protect Aslan (then 11). Neither knows the current shape of the other. Both carry the Will of D. If play lets them meet as pirate captains without recognizing each other first, that plays one way; if Merdo recognizes Aslan on sight, that plays another; if Aslan recognizes Merdo via his scale or horns or something, another. All valid.
plants.notes: Possibly among the 11 canonical Supernovas at Sabaody depending on bounty timing. Crew name, lieutenants, specific Devil Fruit — all generate at first contact, not pre-loaded. Prior draft had a predetermined Diadem Pirates / Nemean Lion / Callista-pit-history cast and a saga-mid reckoning timetable — that PART is retconned. The brother-is-Aslan fact remains. Both brothers' full names are PUBLIC (user directive 2026-04-23): Archon D. Merdo + Archon D. Aslan. Merdo may hear Aslan's name in rumor via News Coo or merchant talk before they meet. Name recognition triggers Merdo's memory (he last heard it when Aslan was 11).

_retcon_note_2026_04_22: Per user directive 2026-04-22 + follow-up: Hadrian's Table saga-endpoint removed. Predetermined cast around Aslan (Diadem Pirates crew name lineup Callista/Ingrid/Esen/Solei, Nemean Lion fruit, Callista-pit-history rack-027, Solei-songs rack-030, island-5/island-6/saga-mid-reckoning schedule) is removed. Aslan himself remains: real younger brother, arrives at Sabaody in the Worst Generation window, possibly Supernova. First contact is emergent, not scheduled. Everything else about him generates at contact moment.
